report: KDT Woodworking Machinery — Wide Research for MONOLITH platform
manufacturer_legal: Guangzhou KDT Machinery Group Co., Ltd. / Guangdong KDT Machinery Co., Ltd. (Foshan, Shunde)

monolith_defaults.note: All models default NOT_ASSESSED / PROHIBITED. Public marketing/spec evidence = 'Verified in documents' only, never 'Observed in operation'. Machine-instance facts (controller hw/version, physical path, tool table, coordinate origin, known-good job) remain Unknown until onsite evidence.

coverage_summary.definition: Per-model coverage = populated technical field-groups / 7. fully=6-7, partially=3-5, minimally=0-2.
minimally_documented: Batched Drill Center with servo feeding
image_or_api_blocked: Batched Drill Center with servo feeding

models.purpose: CNC six-sided drilling center; through/blind holes on ends and planes of furniture panels; milling of straight grooves/profiles

envelope.value: Panel L 70-2800 (kdt-greece)/200-2800 (kdteurope) x W 35-1000 x T 9-60mm

capabilities.value: Drills CONFLICT: upper 10V+8H (Greece/Iberica) vs 12V+8H+1mill (Europe); lower 9V; milling 3.5kW

automation.value: Six-sided through-feed drilling; connects to split software

footprint_power_weight.value: Total power 15.7kW; overall 4115x2250x2210mm; weight 2700kg (regional)

technical.conflicts: KD-610R vs KD-610RH near-identical (same 15.7kW/4115x2250x2210). Regional drill-count/speed conflicts: Greece 10V+8H upper & feed 100/90/50; Europe 12V+8H+1mill & feed 140.

Fields marked Unknown or lacking a source URL do not count.

envelope.value: Panel L 70-3000mm (KDT Iberica) / 70-2800 (KDT UA) / 200-2800 (KDT Europe); W 50-1215mm (35-50 when L<=1000); T 9-60mm

capabilities.value: Drills: Upper 14V+10H, Lower 9V; upper milling 9kW (C-axis)+5.5kW, lower 2x3.5kW; C-axis rotary on upper-left milling spindle

capacities.value: Max speed X/Y/Z 140/90/30 (Iberica) or 140/90/50 (KDT UA/Stancomplect) m/min; clamp speed 140 m/min

controller_hmi.value: Industrial computer, Windows-based; GIBLAB optimizer compatible (per distributor Stancomplect - distributor claim, not KDT-confirmed)

automation.value: Linear ATC 12 positions (10 tools + 2 aggregates); two grippers

footprint_power_weight.value: Total installed power 36.27kW; overall 6040x3300x2190mm (Iberica/UA) CONFLICT 7508x2855x2190mm (KDT Europe); weight 3700kg (Iberica) CONFLICT 3300kg (KDT UA); dust Ø200*1+Ø150*1+Ø100*1

technical.conflicts: Overall size 6040x3300x2190 (KDT Iberica/UA) vs 7508x2855x2190 (KDT Europe). Weight 3700kg (Iberica) vs 3300kg (UA). Panel length 70-3000 vs 70-2800 vs 200-2800 across regional sites. Z speed 30 (Iberica) vs 50 (UA/Stancomplect).

capabilities.value: Twin-pusher / double push handle; Maglev + linear-motor saw carriage; main saw 22kW, scoring 2.2kW; blade 450/75 + 200/50 (kdtmac.lt KS-543HL/HLM sibling data)

capacities.value: Saw car moving speed 200 m/min (KDT listing tagline); carriage travel 160 / idle 200 / pusher 95 m/min (kdtmac.lt sibling)

automation.value: Intelligent simultaneous feeding/processing/feeding; twin pusher + 2 movable group grippers; hydraulic table 4000kg (kdtmac.lt sibling)

footprint_power_weight.value: Installed power 51kW; overall 12970x7570x2030mm; weight 11000kg (kdtmac.lt KS-543HLM sibling)

technical.conflicts: KDT-official exhibition page 1 is image-only (no legible spec table). Distributor kdtmac.lt page is for KS-542HL/543HLM variants; exact KS-543HLS values not confirmed on an official page. Values marked from sibling variant.
